finding_results.notes: Priya now re-enters through a single behavioral cue and onboarding handoff only. The repeated hair/gray description and repeated role statement were removed.
Nick no longer repeats the full 'I was a painter' self-identification. His background is conveyed obliquely through freelance medium/work details and Tommy's reaction.
The chapter now enters through Nick's return-state and threshold hesitation instead of re-describing the building exterior, parking lot, or landscaping.

Expanded the lunch-break sequence into a consequential scene that concretizes the floor's artist population, sharpens the human cost of the work, and brings the chapter to 5195 words while preserving the heading contract.

pass_summaries.summary: All four packet findings were addressed. The revision removes cross-chapter re-introductions, keeps Nick's painter identity oblique on the page, and adds a new lunch-room beat that proves the coworkers' shared visual-art background and deepens the chapter's discovery engine while lifting the chapter above the 5000-word floor.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=4, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
